translated: Yeah, I totally get it.
It's like, it's part of the choreography, but it doesn't feel like just a move.
Right.
Yeah, yeah.
It feels like you're throwing that punch with all your memories behind it.

I found myself getting really emotional there too. That part at the end of the first and second chorus... and then the final chorus ends the same way. The movements are all identical, but for the first and second verses...
Uh-huh.
I could feel that the emotions packed into that final one were different.
Even depending on the performance, I felt like what I was experiencing in that moment changed every time.
I put all my feelings into that fist. It was great, really great.
Yeah, definitely.
Thank you.
I really love the sound of the glass shattering. That part is so cool.
Oh, yeah.
Right?
You can hear it even better during the live shows. It really resonates. And the flames in the background matched Mei-chan perfectly, it looked so cool.
Oh, for sure.
Yeah.
And then right after that, we had "Fantastic!" Oh, that's right.
Yeah.
Exactly.
Since we were getting ready, I was watching Mei-chan's performance from the wings.
Feeling that heat, the two of us were like, "Alright, let's go! Let's keep this momentum going!"
It was really, really good.
You looked so cool.
Thank you so much.
Can I say something too? Kanon performs right before Mei-chan,
and since there's a bit of time before Kanon's next turn, I was able to watch Mei-chan right as she was about to sing.
I saw her from backstage.
And of course, there were times when I'd run into Mei-chan—or rather, Yabu—right after her performance ended.
Every time she finished, she had this incredible passion and a sense of having given it her all,
but at the same time, she always had this... how do I put it?
Yabu always had this look on her face like she was already thinking about what to do better next time.
So, it's like...
She definitely felt a sense of accomplishment in her own way,
but she also had this expression like, "Man, I've still got a long way to go."
Backstage.
Honestly, that just felt so much like Mei-chan.
I was almost in tears while drinking my hot water,
just watching her.
That is so Mei-chan.
From our perspective, we're all thinking, "That was amazing!"
But for her, it's like...
What is it?
The bar she sets for herself is just so high. But no, no, that's not it.
Everyone is like that.
Everyone's desire to improve is so high, and we all share that mindset.
That's why I get inspired to work harder too. It's a mutual influence.
If it were just me, I might not have felt that way, but seeing everyone's performances,
I feel like, "Oh, I can go even further, there's more I can do." I think that's where it comes from.
Yeah. Wow, that's so true.
Seriously, the solo songs this time really provided a lot of mutual inspiration. I felt it too.
Everyone did. That's why I was so happy.
For all of us.
For each other, yeah.
Yeah, yeah.
Even though a solo song is performed alone, in moments like this, you realize you're not actually alone.
I feel like we're all building it together.
Oh, and the outfits too!
That "Girl Crush" style.
It's so good.
Man, I've never worn anything like that before.
It's cool.
But out of all of them, I think it looks the most like something you'd wear as everyday clothes.
That's true.
It's simple and stylish enough that you wouldn't look out of place walking around town. People probably do wear stuff like that.
Definitely.
Yeah, yeah.
The fishnet tights were wonderful.
Honestly, that was a first for me in my entire life.
Wearing fishnets, I mean.
Is it okay for us to even be seeing that?
I'm just full of gratitude.
Right?
We were practically worshipping you backstage. We really were. Oh, and also, I think it was the final show, but during one of the last performances...
I was definitely worshipping.
Your hair got caught—it wasn't part of the choreo—and Kanon was either looking forward or looking down,
I forget which, but you did this gesture to brush it away,
and the camera caught it perfectly. It was just so good, like, "Whoa!"
That's so embarrassing!
